samples.xml_description:
<module id="synchronizer">
    <description>Implement a multi-bit MUX-based synchronizer. The data_en input is synchronous to clk_a and the data_in cannot change during data_en=1. The data_en=1 for at least 3 clk_b cycles. The data_in value can be considered to be sychronized when data_en=1.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk_a">Input clock A.</input>
        <input id="clk_b">Input clock B.</input>
        <input id="arstn">Input reset A.</input>
        <input id="brstn">Input reset B.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[3:0]">Input data.</input>
        <input id="data_en">Input data enable.</input>
        <output id="dataout" width_description="[3:0]">Output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="data_en">A multi-bit MUX-based synchronizer.</enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic id="data_reg">
            <input_ref id="clk_a"/>
            <input_ref id="arstn"/>
            <input_ref id="data_in"/>
            <output_ref id="dataout"/>
            <description>data_reg captures the value of data_in on the positive edge of clk_a.</description>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="en_data_reg">
            <input_ref id="clk_a"/>
            <input_ref id="arstn"/>
            <input_ref id="data_en"/>
            <output_ref id="data_en"/>
            <description>en_data_reg captures the value of data_en on the positive edge of clk_a.</description>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="en_clap_one">
            <input_ref id="clk_b"/>
            <input_ref id="brstn"/>
            <input_ref id="en_data_reg"/>
            <output_ref id="en_clap_two"/>
            <description>en_clap_one captures the value of en_data_reg on the positive edge of clk_b.</description>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="en_clap_two">
            <input_ref id="clk_b"/>
            <input_ref id="brstn"/>
            <input_ref id="en_clap_one"/>
            <output_ref id="dataout"/>
            <description>en_clap_two captures the value of en_clap_one on the positive edge of clk_b.</description>
        </sequential_logic>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
    <enum_case id="data_en">
        <enum_value id="data_en">A multi-bit MUX-based synchronizer.</enum_value>
    </enum_case>
    </implementation>
</module>
